title: [codereview-pass2] coap/Kconfig: LICHEN_COAP_DEADDROP_MAX_TTL_SECONDS naming inconsistent with other MAX_*
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/Kconfig:300 - Other MAX options use MAX_NEIGHBORS, MAX_ROUTES, MAX_ENTRIES. MAX_TTL_SECONDS is overly verbose; shorten to MAX_TTL and update help/reference. Style consistency. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-p3dm
close_reason: Renamed MAX_TTL_SECONDS to MAX_TTL for consistency with other MAX_* options
